LanguageData.UB_SNS_BugExterminator.title: Bug exterminator
LanguageData.UB_SNS_BugExterminator.description: [PAWN_nameDef] made a living creating their own bug extermination business. [PAWN_nameDef] would concoct their own chemical mixes to kill home-invading insects with maximum efficiency. Though technically illegal and VERY dangerous, [PAWN_nameDef] quickly became the go-to person for home insect removal, and nobody questioned [PAWN_possessive] ways.
